market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This elegant 2-bedroom duplex apartment offers exceptional urban living for small groups. Recently renovated, the 4-guest property features floor-to-ceiling windows with panoramic city views, making it perfect for both work and play. The open-plan layout includes a chef's kitchen with stone countertops, a dining area for 6, and a separate living space with premium furnishings. Each bedroom showcases luxury bedding and en-suite bathrooms with rainfall showerheads. The property includes a private balcony with outdoor seating - ideal for breakfast with a view. Located in a secure building with 24/7 concierge service, this listing is particularly suited for professionals seeking proximity to local transit and upscale amenities. While the current photos show the property's modern design, our data shows 75% of similar listings see 20% higher occupancy with optimized title SEO and improved image presentation.
top_amenity_gaps: Balcony (explicitly mentioned in title variants but not in main description)
analysis.photo_order_rec: The wide shot balcony view should be cover photo as lead amenity
key_diagnosis: Occupancy of 15.2% vs cohort median of 28.3% indicates significant optimization opportunity
Title mentions 'Luxury' but doesn't specify differentiators like balcony or open views explicitly
Missing specific location context in 76 open nights' booking window
analysis.outreach_hook: 76 open nights at £181/night represent £13,756 in unoptimized revenue potential this season
